title: thelypteris holttumii
intro: Thelypteris holttumii, also known as the Holttum's maiden fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is primarily found in Southeast Asia, including countries such as Thailand, Malaysia, and Indonesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris holttumii have been used to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
